summary: TWO_COLUMN Banach fixed-point: T(x)=cos x on [0, 1] with L=sin(1)≈0.841 contraction. LEFT axes with BLUE T curve + GREY y=x + YELLOW cobweb diagram via always_redraw on ValueTracker k_tr=0..15 iterates from x_0=0.2 to fixed point x*≈0.739 (Dottie). RIGHT log|x_k-x*| vs k scales ≈ k log L (GREY reference).
